abstract.text: This struct defines a keyboard-specific theme, which can
be used to define a bunch of styles at once.

inlineContent.text: A theme can be copied, tweaked, styled, etc. This struct
and can as such be easily persisted.
KeyboardKit Pro unlocks theme initializers, capabilities,
many predefined themes and style variations, and a theme
based style service. You can use these predefined themes
as they are, or use them as templates for new ones.

abstract.text: This article describes the KeyboardKit Pro theme engine, which can be used to style the entire keyboard with a single theme.
